summary: POS (Point of Sale) feature testing completed successfully. Backend APIs verified with pytest (19/19 tests passed). Frontend UI tested with Playwright - all flows working: product creation, cart management, payment methods, sales completion, Today summary, and History view.

backend_api_tests: ✓ POST /api/pos/products - creates product with name, category, price, stock, emoji
✓ PUT /api/pos/products/{id} - updates product price, stock, is_active
✓ POST /api/pos/sales - records sale with items and payment_method
✓ GET /api/pos/summary?venue_id=... - returns today's stats (total_revenue, total_sales, total_items_sold, by_payment_method)
✓ Edge cases: rejects product without name, rejects sale with empty items
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Navigate to /pos as venue_owner - page loads with 'Venue POS' heading
✓ Navbar shows 'POS' link for venue_owner role
✓ 4 view tabs present: POS, Products, Today, History
✓ Venue selector works (PowerPlay Arena, SmashPoint Courts, etc.)
✓ Products tab: 'Add Product' button opens dialog
✓ Add Product dialog has fields: Name, Category (dropdown), Emoji, Price, Stock
✓ Created product (Energy Drink, beverages, ₹50, stock 10) appears in list
✓ POS tab: Products appear in grid with price and stock
✓ Clicking product adds to cart - Cart shows item with name and price
✓ Cart +/- qty buttons work - Total updates correctly
✓ Payment methods: Cash, Card, UPI buttons work (clicking selects method)
✓ Click Charge - records sale, shows 'Sale Complete' receipt dialog
✓ Receipt shows item details, total, payment method, 'New Sale' button
✓ Today tab shows revenue stats: ₹300 Revenue, 5 Sales, 7 Items Sold
✓ Today tab shows breakdown by payment method: Cash ₹160, UPI ₹80, Card ₹60
✓ History tab shows recent sales with price, payment method, timestamp

critical_code_review_comments: POSPage.js correctly implements offline queue with localStorage (QUEUE_KEY, PRODUCTS_CACHE_KEY)
Backend pos.py properly handles batch sync for offline sales with idempotency (upsert by offline_id)
Stock decrement is correctly implemented in _insert_sale() for finite stock products
Route protection working: /pos only accessible to venue_owner and super_admin roles
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test product 'Energy Drink' (beverages, ₹50, stock 10). Previous test product 'Mineral Water' (₹20) already existed from API curl tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS feature fully tested and working. Backend APIs all pass. UI flows verified: product CRUD, cart operations, all 3 payment methods (cash/card/UPI), sale completion with receipt dialog, Today summary with revenue breakdown, History with sales list. Offline sync feature is implemented but not tested (focus was online flow as requested). The venue owner 'Mr. Reddy' owns 5 venues, testing was done on 'PowerPlay Arena'.
